sections.heading: Company Vision
sections.body: At Heritage InfoTech, we live and breathe the philosophy that people matter and results count.

sections.heading: The Business Value of Technology Comes Through People
sections.body: Heritage InfoTech understands that business value cannot be achieved through technology alone. It starts with people: experts working together to get to the heart of your individual business objectives and develop the most adapted solutions to fit these requirements. We believe this human-centered approach to technology is what sets us apart.

values.title: Innovation
values.description: Pioneering solutions that keep your business ahead of the curve.

values.title: Collaboration
values.description: Working alongside your team to achieve shared goals.

clients.title: Our Clients
clients.subtitle: Trusted by organizations nationwide
clients.body: From staff augmentation and project/business specific solutions to direct (permanent) placement services, Heritage InfoTech's dedicated team of recruiting and staffing experts consistently delivers quality professionals on a time-sensitive basis. Heritage InfoTech places contractors in all 50 states by seamlessly coordinating recruiting resources in local and regional markets with our National Recruiting & Delivery team.

itProfessionals.title: IT Professional Services & Consulting
itProfessionals.subtitle: National IT staffing and consulting excellence
itProfessionals.body: Heritage InfoTech Technologies, Heritage InfoTech Staffing Group's technology specialty division, is a national IT staffing organization operating across industries. We provide contract, direct (permanent), consulting and project management services to top companies and their IT departments.

logistics.title: Logistic Solutions Suite
logistics.subtitle: Route Planning Software Suite
logistics.body: Operating an efficient fleet and mobile workforce that meets customer service expectations begins with proper planning for pickups, deliveries and/or service calls. Heritage InfoTech's Route Planning solutions give logistics professionals the tools to maximize fleet and mobile resource utilization and efficiency.

features.title: Advanced Route Optimization
features.description: Optimize routes across a wide variety of planning scenarios to reduce costs and improve delivery times.

features.title: Compliance Management
features.description: Stay compliant with regulatory requirements while managing your mobile workforce.

features.title: Performance Management
features.description: Track and improve fleet performance with real-time analytics and reporting.

features.title: Mobile Resource Management
features.description: Manage critical mobile resource challenges with enterprise-grade tools.

staffing.title: Staffing Solutions
staffing.subtitle: MSP/VMS excellence with nationwide reach
staffing.body: Heritage InfoTech exists at the forefront of the MSP/VMS revolution, serving to embrace the process rather than follow suit of competitors. As a top supplier for the Managed Supplier Program, and operating an international network of talent that assures compliance, we have developed a transactional service delivery process.
highlights: International talent network with compliance assurance

bpo.title: Business Process Outsourcing
bpo.subtitle: BPO services — Outsourcing to India and China
bpo.body: Global companies are increasingly embracing outsourcing across a wider range of front and back-office processes to help transform their businesses. In addition to significant cost savings, Business Process Outsourcing (BPO) has become a lever for driving business growth and innovation.

benefits.title: Cost Savings
benefits.description: Significant operational cost reductions through strategic outsourcing.

benefits.title: Business Growth
benefits.description: BPO as a lever for driving growth and innovation across your organization.

benefits.title: Process Automation
benefits.description: Automate, standardize and improve business processes on a global level.

benefits.title: Analytics & Insights
benefits.description: BPO integrates tools, analytics and experience to provide deeper business insight.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: We look forward to hearing from you
contact.body: Please contact us at any of our locations. Our team is ready to discuss how Heritage InfoTech can support your business objectives.
